title: Implement #1059 work-shape facts

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the #1059 first slice: expose structured work-shape facts and migrate #1058 soft routing away from authoritative keyword exceptions.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep code-owned gates limited to AW-owned hard facts and blockers; do not remove hard safety checks for scope growth, planning-plus-implementation, generated/source coupling, active planning, delegation, or parent decomposition.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Choose the smallest helper shape, test boundaries, and skill wording needed to prove AW returns facts, blockers, proof cues, and stop conditions while the agent retains soft semantic judgment.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Refactor planning safety gate output around work-shape facts, update skill guidance, and validate workspace behavior.
completion_criteria: Implement exposes structured work-shape facts with hard blockers, agent-decision-required soft cases, stop conditions, and proof cues; #1058 behavior remains covered without authoritative phrase-specific routing.
